title: Able to view activity and views for dashboards (like on other boards, doc, etc)
excerpt: With a board, document, or project, I’m able to see the activity feed and who viewed it (and when). This isn’t available for dashboards where it would also be very useful to know if/when it’s been viewed and/or updated.

posts.author: amylottoland (Amy Scales)
posts.cookedHtml: With a board, document, or project, I’m able to see the activity feed and who viewed it (and when). This isn’t available for dashboards where it would also be very useful to know if/when it’s been viewed and/or updated.
